title: Prevent SQL Injection
input_format: Raw SQL queries with user input concatenation that are vulnerable to SQL injection
output_format: Secure versions using parameterized queries, input validation, and ORM patterns
example_input: query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '" + userInput + "'"
example_output: query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = ?"; params = [userInput]
constraints:
- Must use parameterized queries (never string concatenation)
- Must validate and sanitize all user inputs
- Must handle various SQL injection patterns
- Must work with common SQL databases
function_signature: function sanitizeQuery(rawQuery: string, userInputs: Record<string, string>): { query: string; params: string[] } {}
